questionText: Explain why you did not have an emissions target, and forecast how your emissions will change over the next five years.
questionKo: 배출량 목표가 없는 이유를 설명하고 향후 5 년 동안 배출량이 어떻게 변할지 예측치를 공개하십시오.
sectorTags: Financial services, Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: As setting a target is a pre-requisite for leadership in environmental practice, data users need to understand why companies do not have active targets guiding environmental strategy.

columns.text: Primary reason for no emissions target
options: We are planning to introduce a target in the next two years
Important but not an immediate business priority
Judged to be unimportant, explanation provided
optionsKo: 당사 planning introduce 목표 next two 연도s
중요 but 아니요t immediate 사업 우선순위

columns.text: Anticipated direction of change in scope 1 emissions
columns.textKo: Anticipated direction 의 change Scope 1 배출량

columns.text: Anticipated direction of change in scope 2 emissions
columns.textKo: Anticipated direction 의 change Scope 2 배출량

columns.text: Anticipated direction of change in scope 3 emissions
columns.textKo: Anticipated direction 의 change Scope 3 배출량

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "No target" in response to 7.53.
guidance.textKo: 이 문항 only appears 만약 귀사 선택 "아니요 목표" response 7.53.

guidance.text:
Anticipated direction of change (columns 2-7) 
Select the options that best describe how you forecast your emissions will change over the next five years.
Use the most recent reporting year of emissions as the base year of your forecast. The anticipated change should be based on like-for-like emissions. This means it should exclude any potential changes due to adjusted boundaries, methodologies or correction of errors.
Please explain (column 8) 
Provide an explanation of why you do not have a target and the timeline to implement one, if applicable.
CDP acknowledges that the forecast will be an estimate, but you should provide a brief description of the reasons why you forecast this change. For example, this could be due to forecasted changes in output or expected emissions reduction activities. In the unlikely event you forecast no change in emissions over the next five years, explain why not.
guidance.textKo: Anticipated direction 의 change (열 2-7) 선택 선택지 best 설명 how 귀사 forecast 귀사의 배출량 change over next five 연도s. Use most recent 보고연도 의 배출량 기준연도 의 귀사의 forecast. anticipated change 해야 합니다 based like--like 배출량. 이 means it 해야 합니다 exclude 하나 이상 potential changes due adjusted boundaries, 방법론 또는 correction 의 errors. 설명하십시오 (열 8) 제공 explanation 의 why 귀사 do 아니요t have 목표 및 timeline implement one, 만약 applicable. CDP ack아니요wledges forecast 추정, but 귀사 해야 합니다 제공 brief description 의 이유s why 귀사 forecast 이 change. example, 이 could due forecasted changes output 또는 expected 배출량 reduction 활동. unlikely event 귀사 forecast 변경 없음 배출량 over next five 연도s, 설명 why 아니요t.

Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this question.

'We are planning to introduce a target in the next two years' selected in column 'Primary reason...' AND Any option excluding ‘Unknown' selected in all of the following columns - 1/3 points
- ‘Anticipated direction of change in scope 1 emissions'
- ‘Anticipated direction of change in scope 2 emissions'
- ‘Anticipated direction of change in scope 3 emissions'
A maximum of 1/3 points is available for this question.

change.question_ko: 배출량 목표가 없는 이유를 설명하고 향후 5 년 동안 배출량이 어떻게 변할지 예측치를 공개하십시오.
change.q2025_text: Explain why you did not have an emissions target, and forecast how your emissions will change over the next five years.
change.scoring_change_summary:
CC All sectors Disclosure • Criteria have been updated to be proportional per cell displayed. More columns have been added to this question around anticipated change in emissions. Scoring updated to utilize these.
CC All sectors Awareness • Checks added for organizations selecting ‘We are planning to introduce a target in the next two years'. More columns have been added to this question around anticipated change in emissions. Scoring updated to utilize these.
change.reflected:
2026 question text applied
2026 response type/columns applied
2026 D/A/M/L point allocation linked
2026 scoring criteria linked
2025-to-2026 change summary linked
change.scoring_change_summaryKo: CC 모든 섹터 공시 • 기준 have up날짜 입력d proportional per 셀 displayed. More 열 have added 이 문항 around anticipated change 배출량. Scoring up날짜 입력d utilize 이. CC 모든 섹터 인지 • Checks added 조직 선택ing ‘당사 planning introduce 목표 next two 연도s'. More 열 have added 이 문항 around anticipated change 배출량. Scoring up날짜 입력d utilize 이.
change.q2025_textKo: 배출량 목표가 없는 이유를 설명하고 향후 5 년 동안 배출량이 어떻게 변할지 예측치를 공개하십시오. `
change.question_en: Explain why you did not have an emissions target, and forecast how your emissions will change over the next five years.

listTitleEn: Explain why you did not have an emissions target, and forecast how your emissions will change over the next five years.
listTitleKo: 배출량 목표가 없는 이유를 설명하고 향후 5 년 동안 배출량이 어떻게 변할지 예측치를 공개하십시오.
